scripts.check:repo-health: pnpm check:file-caps && pnpm check:thin-facades && pnpm check:boundaries
scripts.check:harness: pnpm check:agent-map && pnpm check:docs-index && pnpm check:exec-plans
scripts.release-check: pnpm check:repo-health && pnpm audit:prod && pnpm --filter ./apps/api test:upload-security && pnpm check:prisma-lock && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm --filter ./apps/api build && pnpm --filter ./apps/web build && pnpm check:web-bundle-shape && pnpm smoke:v2
scripts.security-perf:reaudit: pnpm --filter ./apps/web test -- src/App.test.tsx src/components/LoginForm.test.tsx src/cssImportOrder.test.ts src/v2/AppShellV2.test.tsx src/v2/AppShellV2.bootstrap-routing.test.tsx src/v2/AppShellV2.navigation-drawer.test.tsx src/v2/AppShellV2.saved-fee-path.test.tsx src/v2/OverviewPageV2.test.tsx src/v2/OverviewPageV2.setup-import.test.tsx src/v2/OverviewPageV2.review-flow.test.tsx src/v2/OverviewPageV2.document-import.test.tsx src/v2/EnnustePageV2.test.tsx src/v2/EnnustePageV2.cockpit-layout.test.tsx src/v2/EnnustePageV2.planning-flows.test.tsx src/v2/EnnustePageV2.readiness-handoff.test.tsx src/v2/ReportsPageV2.test.tsx src/v2/ReportsPageV2.preview-detail.test.tsx src/v2/ReportsPageV2.export-readiness.test.tsx src/v2/ReportsPageV2.routing-empty-state.test.tsx src/v2/VesinvestPlanningPanel.test.tsx src/v2/VesinvestPlanningPanel.draft-admin.test.tsx src/v2/VesinvestPlanningPanel.evidence-workflow.test.tsx src/v2/VesinvestPlanningPanel.report-handoff.test.tsx src/v2/useForecastPageController.test.tsx src/i18n/locales/localeIntegrity.test.ts && pnpm --filter ./apps/api test -- src/auth/auth.controller.spec.ts src/projections/projection-engine.spec.ts src/v2/v2.service.spec.ts src/v2/v2-import-overview.service.spec.ts src/v2/v2-forecast.service.spec.ts src/v2/v2-report.service.spec.ts src/v2/v2-report-pdf.spec.ts test/app.module.spec.ts && pnpm --filter ./apps/web typecheck && pnpm --filter ./apps/api typecheck
scripts.smoke:v2: pnpm --filter ./apps/web test -- src/cssImportOrder.test.ts src/v2/overviewWorkflow.test.ts src/v2/AppShellV2.test.tsx src/v2/AppShellV2.bootstrap-routing.test.tsx src/v2/AppShellV2.navigation-drawer.test.tsx src/v2/AppShellV2.saved-fee-path.test.tsx src/v2/OverviewPageV2.workspace-handoff.details.test.tsx src/v2/ReportsPageV2.export-readiness.test.tsx src/v2/VesinvestPlanningPanel.report-handoff.test.tsx src/v2/useForecastPageController.test.tsx
